title: Smoky Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Venezuela, made with tender beef and a rich, smoky sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside. Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add chipotle peppers, cumin, and coriander to pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato paste to pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add beef broth to pot and bring to a boil. Scrape up any browned bits from bottom of pot.
Return beef to pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, until beef is tender, about 2 hours.
Stir in coconut milk and continue to cook for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
